title: Torpedo (disambiguation)
content:
'''Torpedo''' can refer to the following:

==[[Canon]]==
{{Incomplete list}}
*'''[[Energy-shell charge]]''', a type of weapon used by the [[Trade Federation]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]
*'''[[Hammerhead Torpedo Corvette]]''', a model of the [[Sphyrna-class Hammerhead corvette|''Sphyrna''-class Hammerhead corvette]]
*'''[[Homing torpedo]]''', small projectile missiles that targeted enemies with guiding systems
*'''[[Ion torpedo]]''', a torpedo used to deliver heavy ion damage to vehicles and stationary weapons
*'''[[MG7-A torpedo launcher]]''', a torpedo launcher produced by [[Krupx Munitions]] installed on the [[T-70 X-wing starfighter]]
*'''[[Proton torpedo]]''', a type of explosive ordnance
**'''[[MG7-A proton torpedo]]''', a type of proton torpedo produced by Krupx Munitions
*'''[[Torpedo siege platform]]''', a proposed design developed by the [[Galactic Republic]]'s [[Republic Special Weapons Group|Special Weapons Group]] in the aftermath of the [[Naboo Crisis]]
*'''[[Tracking torpedo]]''', a type of torpedo used by CIS [[Admiral]] [[Trench]] during the Clone Wars to defeat stealth cruisers

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
{{Incomplete list}}
*'''[[Assault proton torpedo]]''', [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] grade torpedo used by and against capital ships
*'''[[Devastator torpedo]]''', a slim missile developed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and used by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]'s forces.
*'''[[Electromagnetic torpedo]]''', a type of torpedo used to contain deadlier weapons
*'''[[Electron torpedo]]''', a type of missile used for combat
*'''[[Energy torpedo/Legends|Energy torpedo]]''', a type of plasma weapon
*'''[[Homing torpedo/Legends|Homing torpedo]]''', small projectile missiles with guiding systems
*'''[[Ion torpedo/Legends|Ion torpedo]]''', a type of torpedo used in [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] combat
*'''[[Lightspeed torpedo]]''', a type of torpedo capable of traveling through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]
*'''[[Mobile Proton Torpedo Launcher]]''' or '''MPTL-L''', a [[Crawler (vehicle)|crawler-type]] artillery mobile weapons platform fitted with a proton torpedo launcher
*'''[[Mobile Proton Torpedo Launcher-2a]]''', a medium crawler-type mobile proton torpedo launcher and the successor to the MPTL-L
*'''[[Plasma torpedo/Legends|Plasma torpedo]]''', also known as a '''shieldbuster torpedo''', a special type of weapon used to overwhelm the shields of vehicles
*'''[[Proton torpedo/Legends|Proton torpedo]]''', a type of ordnance
**'''[[MG1-A proton torpedo]]''', a type of proton torpedo used by the [[Centax-class heavy frigate|''Centax''-class heacy frigate]] [[Ranger (Centax-class)|''Ranger'']] during the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]]
**'''[[MG7-A proton torpedo/Legends|MG7-A proton torpedo]]''', a type of proton torpedo produced by [[Krupx Munitions/Legends|Krupx Munitions]] and commonly used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
*'''[[Proton torpedo launcher]]''', an armament mounted on vehicles to launch proton torpedoes
*'''[[Resonance torpedo]]''', a missile capable of causing a [[Star/Legends|star]] to [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]]
*'''[[Seeker-torpedo]]''', a type of ground-to-air missile used by the [[Beast Riders]] of [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]]
*'''[[T-33 plasma torpedo]]''', a projectile weapon carried by the [[BTL-S8 K-wing assault starfighter]] and designed to disable [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] systems
*'''[[Torpedo attack carrier]]''', underwater craft that acted as protective support for [[Aquatic Terrain Armored Transport]]s and were equipped with [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missiles]]
*'''[[Torpedo line]]''', a formation of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
*'''[[Torpedo platform]]''', a type of large warship used prior to and during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]
*The '''[[Torpedo Sphere/Legends|Torpedo Sphere]]''', a mobile [[battlestation]] manufactured by [[Loronar Defense Industries]]
*'''[[Torpedo tube]]''', a device used to fire torpedoes
*'''[[Tracking torpedo]]''', a type of torpedo used by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Trench/Legends|Trench]] during the Clone Wars to defeat stealth cruisers

{{Disambig}}
